keynotes.text: This is one of the anæsthetics experimented on by J. Y. Simpson and later by B. W. Richardson. It has produced a few definite symptoms.

head.text: A tendency to pitch forward. Sense of fulness in vessels of brain. Much headache and giddiness for some time after its employment.

chest_heart.text: Excessive over-action of the heart. Rapid and painful respiration. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main.
